setting: A couple is discussing the boyfriend's difficult relationship with the girlfriend's parents.
lyrics:
If you ever leave me, baby,
Leave some morphine at my door
'Cause it would take a whole lot of medication
To realize what we used to have,
We don't have it anymore.

There's no religion that could save me
No matter how long my knees are on the floor
So keep in mind all the sacrifices I'm makin'
Will keep you by my side
And keep you from walkin' out the door.

Cause there'll be no sunlight
If I lose you, baby
There'll be no clear skies
If I lose you, baby

Just like the clouds
My eyes will do the same if you walk away
Everyday, it'll rain, rain, rain

I'll never be your mother's favorite
Your daddy can't even look me in the eye
Oooo if I was in their shoes, I'd be doin' the same thing
Sayin' there goes my little girl
Walkin' with that troublesome guy

But they're just afraid of something they can't understand
Oooo but little darlin' watch me change their minds
Yea for you I'll try I'll try I'll try I'll try
I'll pick up these broken pieces 'til I'm bleeding

If that'll make you mine

Cause there'll be no sunlight
If I lose you, baby
There'll be no clear skies
If I lose you, baby
Just like the clouds
My eyes will do the same if you walk away
Everyday, it will rain, rain, rain

Oh don't just say, goodbye
Don't just say, goodbye
I'll pick up these broken pieces 'til I'm bleeding
If that'll make it right

Cause there'll be no sunlight
If I lose you, baby

And there'll be no clear skies
If I lose you, baby
And just like the clouds
My eyes will do the same if you walk away
Everyday, it'll rain, rain, rain

lyricsJa.en: If you ever leave me, baby,
lyricsJa.ja: もし君が僕を去っていくのなら

lyricsJa.en: Leave some morphine at my door
lyricsJa.ja: ドアの前に、痛みを消す薬を置いていってくれ

lyricsJa.en: 'Cause it would take a whole lot of medication
lyricsJa.ja: だって、かつての僕たちが持っていたものを

lyricsJa.en: To realize what we used to have,
lyricsJa.ja: もう失ってしまったんだと受け入れるには

lyricsJa.en: We don't have it anymore.
lyricsJa.ja: 相当な助けが必要なんだ

lyricsJa.en: There's no religion that could save me
lyricsJa.ja: どんなに長く膝をついて祈り続けても

lyricsJa.en: No matter how long my knees are on the floor
lyricsJa.ja: 僕を救える神様なんてどこにもいない

lyricsJa.en: So keep in mind all the sacrifices I'm makin'
lyricsJa.ja: だから忘れないで、僕が捧げているこの犠牲はすべて

lyricsJa.en: Will keep you by my side
lyricsJa.ja: 君を僕のそばに留めておくため

lyricsJa.en: And keep you from walkin' out the door.
lyricsJa.ja: 君がこのドアから出ていかないようにするためなんだ

lyricsJa.en: Cause there'll be no sunlight
lyricsJa.ja: だって、太陽の光さえ消えてしまうから

lyricsJa.en: If I lose you, baby
lyricsJa.ja: もし君を失ってしまったら

lyricsJa.en: There'll be no clear skies
lyricsJa.ja: 空が晴れることなんて二度とない

lyricsJa.en: If I lose you, baby
lyricsJa.ja: もし君を失ってしまったら

lyricsJa.en: Just like the clouds
lyricsJa.ja: 雲が雨を降らせるように

lyricsJa.en: My eyes will do the same if you walk away
lyricsJa.ja: 君が去れば、僕の瞳からも涙が溢れ出す

lyricsJa.en: Everyday, it'll rain, rain, rain
lyricsJa.ja: 毎日、雨が降り続けるんだ

lyricsJa.en: I'll never be your mother's favorite
lyricsJa.ja: 君のお母さんに気に入られることなんて一生ないし

lyricsJa.en: Your daddy can't even look me in the eye
lyricsJa.ja: お父さんは僕の目を見ようともしない

lyricsJa.en: Oooo if I was in their shoes, I'd be doin' the same thing
lyricsJa.ja: もし僕が彼らの立場でも、同じことをするだろう

lyricsJa.en: Sayin' there goes my little girl
lyricsJa.ja: 「あんな厄介な男と一緒に、娘が行ってしまう」ってね

lyricsJa.en: Walkin' with that troublesome guy
But they're just afraid of something they can't understand
lyricsJa.ja: 彼らはただ、理解できないものを恐れているだけさ

lyricsJa.en: Oooo but little darlin' watch me change their minds
lyricsJa.ja: でも見ていて、僕が彼らの考えを変えてみせるから

lyricsJa.en: Yea for you I'll try I'll try I'll try I'll try
lyricsJa.ja: そう、君のためなら何度だって立ち向かう

lyricsJa.en: I'll pick up these broken pieces 'til I'm bleeding
lyricsJa.ja: 血が流れるまで、壊れた破片を拾い集めるよ

lyricsJa.en: If that'll make you mine
lyricsJa.ja: それで君が僕のものになってくれるなら

lyricsJa.en: Cause there'll be no sunlight
lyricsJa.ja: だって、太陽の光さえ消えてしまうから

lyricsJa.en: If I lose you, baby
lyricsJa.ja: もし君を失ってしまったら

lyricsJa.en: There'll be no clear skies
lyricsJa.ja: 空が晴れることなんて二度とない

lyricsJa.en: If I lose you, baby
lyricsJa.ja: もし君を失ってしまったら

lyricsJa.en: Just like the clouds
lyricsJa.ja: 雲が雨を降らせるように

lyricsJa.en: My eyes will do the same if you walk away
lyricsJa.ja: 君が去れば、僕の瞳からも涙が溢れ出す

lyricsJa.en: Everyday, it will rain, rain, rain
lyricsJa.ja: 毎日、雨が降り続けるんだ

lyricsJa.en: Oh don't just say, goodbye
lyricsJa.ja: ああ、ただ「さよなら」なんて言わないで

lyricsJa.en: Don't just say, goodbye
lyricsJa.ja: 行かないでくれ

lyricsJa.en: I'll pick up these broken pieces 'til I'm bleeding
lyricsJa.ja: 血を流してでも、バラバラになった心を繋ぎ合わせるよ

lyricsJa.en: If that'll make it right
lyricsJa.ja: それで全てが元通りになるのなら

lyricsJa.en: Cause there'll be no sunlight
lyricsJa.ja: だって、太陽の光さえ消えてしまうから

lyricsJa.en: If I lose you, baby
lyricsJa.ja: もし君を失ってしまったら

lyricsJa.en: And there'll be no clear skies
lyricsJa.ja: 空が晴れることなんて二度とない

lyricsJa.en: If I lose you, baby
lyricsJa.ja: もし君を失ってしまったら

lyricsJa.en: And just like the clouds
lyricsJa.ja: 雲が雨を降らせるように

lyricsJa.en: My eyes will do the same if you walk away
lyricsJa.ja: 君が去れば、僕の瞳からも涙が溢れ出す

lyricsJa.en: Everyday, it'll rain, rain, rain
lyricsJa.ja: 毎日、雨が降り続けるんだ

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I know I'm probably not your mother's favorite person right now.
sentences.displayHtml: I know I'm probably not your mother's favorite person right now.

conversation.japanese: 今、僕がお母さんに気に入られてないのは分かってるよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: It's true, and my dad can't even look you in the eye lately.
sentences.displayHtml: It's true, and my dad can't even look you in the eye lately.

conversation.japanese: 本当ね、お父さんなんて最近、あなたの目を見ることさえできないんだから。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Honestly, if I was in their shoes, I'd probably feel the same way about a troublesome guy like me.
sentences.displayHtml: Honestly, if I was in their shoes, I'd probably feel the same way about a troublesome guy like me.

conversation.japanese: 正直、もし僕が彼らの立場だったら、自分みたいな厄介な男に対して同じように思うだろうな。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I think they're just afraid of something they can't understand.
sentences.displayHtml: I think they're just afraid of something they can't understand.

conversation.japanese: そんなこと言わないで。二人はただ、自分たちが理解できないものを恐れているだけだと思うわ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I'm willing to make any sacrifices necessary to keep you by my side.
sentences.displayHtml: I'm willing to make any sacrifices necessary to keep you by my side.

conversation.japanese: 君を僕のそばに留めておくためなら、どんな犠牲だって払うつもりだよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Just keep in mind that I'm with you, no matter what they think.
sentences.displayHtml: Just keep in mind that I'm with you, no matter what they think.

conversation.japanese: 二人がどう思おうと、私はあなたの味方だってことだけは覚えておいて。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Just watch me change their minds and prove I'm right for you.
sentences.displayHtml: Just watch me change their minds and prove I'm right for you.

conversation.japanese: 分かった。僕が彼らの考えを変えて、君にふさわしい男だって証明してみせるよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I hope so, because I really don't want to lose you.
sentences.displayHtml: I hope so, because I really don't want to lose you.

conversation.japanese: 期待してるわ。だって、本当にあなたを失いたくないもの。
